All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
ActivityConfig
Configuration for the weekly activity bonus task.
ActivityTracker
Counts active commit weeks and calculates the corresponding bonus.
BonusEntry
Immutable bonus points record for a specific student and task.
BuildStatus
Result of a single build pipeline step.
CheckInstruction
Specifies which students and tasks to check in this run.
CheckPoint
A grading checkpoint in the course (e.g.
ConfigLoader
Loads configuration from a Groovy DSL file (oop_checker.groovy).
GitManager
Performs git operations (clone, update, log queries) via the console git client.
GradeScale
Maps a score percentage to a 2–5 academic grade.
Group
A course group containing a list of students.
HtmlReporter
Generates a self-contained HTML report from check results.
Main
Entry point.
OopCheckerConfig
Root configuration object populated from DSL files.
OopCheckerScriptInterface
Java interface implemented by OopCheckerScript.groovy.
ProcessResult
Immutable result of an external process execution.
ProcessRunner
Runs external processes with a timeout and captures their combined output.
ProjectChecker
Orchestrates the check pipeline for all students and tasks.
ScoreCalculator
Calculates the score for a student's task result.
ScoringConfig
Parameters controlling how scores are calculated.
Student
A course student identified by their GitHub login.
StudentCheckResult
Aggregated check result for one student: task results plus activity bonus.
Task
A course task (lab assignment).
TaskCheckResult
Check result for a single task of a single student.
TestCounts
Aggregated test run counts: passed, failed, skipped.
